results.name: t-pose
results.description: The default pose in 3D modelling, with someone's body and legs rigid and vertical and arms outstretched either side, like a T. (Not to be confused with [open pose](/tags/artwork/open-pose).)

results.name: trans
results.description: Transgender characters. This includes trans men, trans women, and nonbinary characters.

results.name: transcendental life/damage
results.description: Damage or life expressed in transcendental numbers. (Yes, we know this means it's not actually fractional.)

results.name: transferrable aura
results.description: Auras that have a built-in way to move them between permanents.

results.name: transform-improvement
results.description: Cards that do the same effect but better, or the same effects but with extra when they transform.

results.name: transform-mirror
results.description: Cards that mirror themselves mechanically when they transform

results.name: trepanation
results.description: The surgical procedure of drilling a hole into someone's skull.

results.name: tribute
results.description: Collection tag used to apply the various tags that comprise the keyword Tribute. Should be 1:1 with kw:tribute.

results.name: tricycle-land
results.description: Lands that can tap for three colors of mana and have the ability to cycle.

results.name: trigger from exile
results.description: Abilities that trigger from inside exile.

results.name: trigger from graveyard
results.description: Abilities that trigger from inside the graveyard.

results.name: triggers at cleanup step
results.description: Cards that trigger at the cleanup step, rather than what would usually be the end step.

results.name: triland
results.description: Lands which tap for three colors. For triland cycles specifically see [cycle-triland](/tags/card/cycle-triland).

results.name: trio
results.description: Art compositions that emphasize a trio of figures. There may yet be more figures beyond the three in the art. Related but not identical: [three figures](three-figures).

results.name: trojan horse
results.description: Depictions of  a Trojan Horse analogue.
